delete.description: Delete specific checkpoints for a model.
Delete a model, all its checkpoints, artifacts, and the associated W&B run.

post.description: Create a new RL (Reinforcement Learning) training job.
Create a new SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning) training job.

get.description: Get a training job by ID.
Get events for a training job.

Check health of all system components.

Returns:
    JSON with status of:
    - api: Always true (if endpoint is reachable)
    - database: Whether DB connection works
    - cpu_queue: Success, duration, and any errors
    - gpu_queue: Success, duration, and any errors

Returns HTTP 503 if any checks fail.

Annotation.title: Annotation
Annotation.description: A URL citation when using web search.

AnnotationURLCitation.title: AnnotationURLCitation
AnnotationURLCitation.description: A URL citation when using web search.

Audio.title: Audio
Audio.description:
Data about a previous audio response from the model.
[Learn more](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/audio).

ChatCompletionAssistantMessageParam.title: ChatCompletionAssistantMessageParam
ChatCompletionAssistantMessageParam.description: Messages sent by the model in response to user messages.

ChatCompletionAudio.title: ChatCompletionAudio
ChatCompletionAudio.description:
If the audio output modality is requested, this object contains data
about the audio response from the model. [Learn more](https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/audio).

ChatCompletionDeveloperMessageParam.title: ChatCompletionDeveloperMessageParam
ChatCompletionDeveloperMessageParam.description:
Developer-provided instructions that the model should follow, regardless of
messages sent by the user. With o1 models and newer, `developer` messages
replace the previous `system` messages.

ChatCompletionFunctionToolParam.title: ChatCompletionFunctionToolParam
ChatCompletionFunctionToolParam.description: A function tool that can be used to generate a response.

ChatCompletionMessage.title: ChatCompletionMessage
ChatCompletionMessage.description: A chat completion message generated by the model.

ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCall.title: ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCall
ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCall.description: A call to a custom tool created by the model.

ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCallParam.title: ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCallParam
ChatCompletionMessageCustomToolCallParam.description: A call to a custom tool created by the model.

ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCall.title: ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCall
ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCall.description: A call to a function tool created by the model.

ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCallPar.title: ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCallParam
ChatCompletionMessageFunctionToolCallPar.description: A call to a function tool created by the model.

ChatCompletionSystemMessageParam.title: ChatCompletionSystemMessageParam
ChatCompletionSystemMessageParam.description:
Developer-provided instructions that the model should follow, regardless of
messages sent by the user. With o1 models and newer, use `developer` messages
for this purpose instead.

ChatCompletionUserMessageParam.title: ChatCompletionUserMessageParam
ChatCompletionUserMessageParam.description:
Messages sent by an end user, containing prompts or additional context
information.

ChoiceLogprobs.title: ChoiceLogprobs
ChoiceLogprobs.description: Log probability information for the choice.

training_data_url.title: Training Data Url
training_data_url.description: W&B artifact path for training data (e.g., 'wandb-artifact:///entity/project/artifact-name:version')

CreateSFTTrainingJob.title: CreateSFTTrainingJob
CreateSFTTrainingJob.description:
Schema for creating a new SFT (Supervised Fine-Tuning) TrainingJob.

The client should upload the training data (trajectories.jsonl and metadata.json)
to W&B Artifacts and provide the artifact URL.

CreateTrainingJob.title: CreateTrainingJob
CreateTrainingJob.description: Schema for creating a new TrainingJob.

entity.title: Entity

base_model.title: Base Model
base_model.description: Base model identifier or HuggingFace model path to fine-tune from

return_existing.title: Return Existing
return_existing.description: If true, return existing model if one with the same name already exists instead of creating a new one
